raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is clear free space on the tabletop to push it away from the two boxes without colliding into them; pushing is preferred over grasping to quickly clear the approach path to box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is displaced forward (away from box_2/box_1), creating clearance in front of the attached boxes for a safe grasp on box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been moved out of the way and the right arm can contact box_2 from the outer (right) side without pinching against box_1; stabilization is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may transmit forces during lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is constrained against lateral motion, reducing torsion/drag on the attachment while box_1 is being grasped and lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is sufficient clearance on the left/outside of box_1 for a palm-side grip; the left arm can form a secure non-claw grasp on a 30x30x30 cm box, and box_2 is currently stabilized to prevent the pair from shifting.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and is no longer resting on the table (lift initiated), while box_2 remains stabilized."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is lifted/controlled by the left arm and box_2 remains attached; continued stabilization is required until box_1 is fully clear of the tabletop and nearby objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is fully picked up and controlled; box_2 has not shifted into the robot or other objects during the lift."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is clear free space on the tabletop to push it away from the two boxes without colliding into them; pushing is preferred over grasping to quickly clear the approach path to box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is displaced forward (away from box_2/box_1), creating clearance in front of the attached boxes for a safe grasp on box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been moved out of the way and the right arm can contact box_2 from the outer (right) side without pinching against box_1; stabilization is needed because box_2 is attached_to box_1 and may transmit forces during lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is constrained against lateral motion, reducing torsion/drag on the attachment while box_1 is being grasped and lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is sufficient clearance on the left/outside of box_1 for a palm-side grip; the left arm can form a secure non-claw grasp on a 30x30x30 cm box, and box_2 is currently stabilized to prevent the pair from shifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and is no longer resting on the table (lift initiated), while box_2 remains stabilized.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is lifted/controlled by the left arm and box_2 remains attached; continued stabilization is required until box_1 is fully clear of the tabletop and nearby objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is fully picked up and controlled; box_2 has not shifted into the robot or other objects during the lift.
